info.title: RoughRunway Agent API
info.description: Build crypto treasury runway models from natural language descriptions. Returns a shareable URL pointing to a fully interactive model.

post.summary: Build a runway model from a plain-English description
post.description: Parse a natural-language description of a crypto treasury, burn rate, and team, then return a shareable URL that loads the model interactively. No authentication required.

description.description: Plain-English description of the treasury, team size, burn rate, and asset prices.
description.example: We're a 12-person DeFi team with $2M USDC, 100 ETH at $3,500, and 50M native tokens (NEX) at $0.10. Monthly burn is $180k mostly on headcount.

shareUrl.description: Full URL the user can open to view their interactive runway model.

summary.description: Human-readable summary of what was parsed from the description.

modelName.description: Short name derived from the description for the model.

503.description: AI features not configured on this instance
